tiebreaker: Player with the highest single-round score

categories.label: Bid Points
categories.description: Points from correct/incorrect bids (+20 per trick if correct, -10 per trick off if wrong, or +/-10 x round for zero bids)

categories.label: 14 Card Bonuses
categories.description: +10 per standard suit 14 captured, +20 for black (Jolly Roger) 14 captured (only if bid was correct)

categories.label: Character Capture Bonuses
categories.description: Pirate captures Mermaid (+20), Skull King captures Pirate (+30), Mermaid captures Skull King (+40) (only if bid was correct)
